input.prompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

input.initialPrompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

data.content:
Two separate issues:

**1. `StaticResource` doesn't update at runtime**
`StaticResource` resolves once at XAML load time. Switch to `DynamicResource` so bindings re-evaluate when you swap the merged dictionary:

```xml
<!-- ❌ Won't update -->
<Label TextColor="{StaticResource PrimaryTextColor}" />

<!-- ✅ Will update -->
<Label TextColor="{DynamicResource PrimaryTextColor}" />
```

Swap themes at runtime by replacing the merged dictionary:

```csharp
var mergedDicts = Application.Current.Resources.MergedDictionaries;
mergedDicts.Clear();
mergedDicts.Add(useDark ? new DarkTheme() : new LightTheme());
```

**2. Activity restarts on Android config change**
By default, Android destroys and recreates the Activity when UI mode (dark/light) changes. Add `UiMode` to `ConfigurationChanges` in your `MainActivity.cs`:

```csharp
[Activity(
    Theme = "@style/Maui.SplashTheme",
    MainLauncher = true,
    ConfigurationChanges = ConfigChanges.ScreenSize
        | ConfigChanges.Orientation
        | ConfigChanges.UiMode          // ← prevents restart on dark mode toggle
        | ConfigChanges.ScreenLayout
        | ConfigChanges.SmallestScreenSize)]
public class MainActivity : MauiAppCompatActivity { }
```

Then detect the system change and apply your theme:

```csharp
protected override void OnConfigurationChanged(Configuration newConfig)
{
    base.OnConfigurationChanged(newConfig);

    bool isSystemDark = (newConfig.UiMode & UiMode.NightMask) == UiMode.NightYes;
    // swap your ResourceDictionary here
}
```

**TL;DR**: `StaticResource` → `DynamicResource` for all theme-bound values; add `ConfigChanges.UiMode` to prevent the Activity restart.
data.reasoningText:
The user is asking about two related .NET MAUI issues:

1. **StaticResource vs DynamicResource**: They're using `StaticResource` for theme colors, but `StaticResource` is resolved once at load time and never updates. They need `DynamicResource` for runtime theme switching.

2. **App restarting on Android dark mode toggle**: When Android system dark mode changes, the Activity is recreated by default. They need to handle this via `ConfigurationChanges` in the Activity attribute.

Let me give a concise, helpful answer.
